textByHashes.64dbf5321c17e6e97be1ca59b67ecd14b7e8767a: Stop! Who ever passes this bridge must answer me these questions three.
textByHashes.0920794d60261453ad9100e888a4191374e74bce: Well, perhaps. You should speak to Alec the Guildmaster, he sorts out that kind of thing. You'll find him up on a small island north of the guild.
textByHashes.d5a3dd00a0d4135c3ce8f19bc2e0149c8bd800e7: Oh go on then. I suppose you have proven yourself worthy.
textByHashes.b3bb4a8574efe0ea2da3f92587615dd128fbaae8: There's always someone who wants to be difficult, off with you!
textByHashes.426e9153012c5474f34d0eee5c7b71fa9df924f4: What... is the capital of Kandarin?
textByHashes.592111de72ef396e3c9f62b35a1f05cb7c71ed23: What... is the air-speed velocity of an unladen chompy?
textByHashes.6262fb8e1a2a506f949871f41169c7cd1f323f73: Huh? I-- I don't know that. ARGHHH!
textByHashes.1f681a124514dcac49bcc486e978db25f34d1137: Internal self-doubt and the crippling feeling of everyone hating me.
textByHashes.dba818aa52e9ce9dbdc578055aa341ca74f15bf0: I'm sure I've seen them fly before, but it could've been falling gracefully.
